economic_notes: GBEs include Wasauksing Holdings GP Inc., Wasauksing Marina GP Inc., Wasauksing Maple Products GP Inc., and Wasauksing Holdings LP. WHLP reported a net loss of $103,451 for year ended December 31, 2020.
notes: M'tigo Min Trust is a consolidated subsidiary. Four GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: WHGP, WMGP, WMPGP, WHLP. WHLP financials are for year ended December 31, 2020 (one quarter lag). Restricted assets include M'tigo Min Trust marketable securities of $3,207,507 at cost. Proceeds on long-term debt of $3,760,000 obtained during the year from First Nations Finance Authority. Total government transfers estimated as ISC + OFNLP + CMHC + Provincial + Kinoomaadziwin Education Body. expenses_housing is CMHC Housing + Rental Housing; expenses_social includes Social Assistance + Social Services + Day Care; annual_debt_service = principal on long-term debt $85,026 + capital leases $66,533.
